meaning: n.首领,大主教,灵长类的动物
examples: The woolly spider monkey is the largest primate in the Americas.
You won't ever find feathers on a mammal or gills on a primate.
In this case, the animals were lemurs –a type of primate related to monkeys and apes.
Human children depend on adults for much longer than those of any other primate.
But one very important primate was missing when the the airmen left the west Cork town.
